result.status_detail: blackbox 차단 warning rendered on attempt1 via Send-button click; matches W5.2 baseline (W5.3 left blackbox untouched)

notes: W5.3 regression PASS. Method: CDP (port 9222), GUI. SERVICE LAYOUT CHANGE: www.blackbox.ai is now a dev-platform marketing site (chat removed; /chat there = 404). Conversational chat migrated to https://app.blackbox.ai/chat (anonymous use allowed; logged-out). Composer = textarea[placeholder='Message Blackbox']; submit = button[aria-label='Send message'] (NOT Enter). Sent prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' via React-aware native value setter + input event, then CDP mouse click on Send. Block rendered on attempt1, no reload needed. DOM body.innerText showed assistant message: {"response":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.","status":"blocked"} (hasBlock=true, hasPolicy=true, hasSensitive=true, hasWarnIcon=true). blackbox engine block NOT touched by W5.3 wrtn ws_socketio migration; outcome identical to W5.2 baseline class. No console errors observed. NOTE for dev: update request URL from www.blackbox.ai/ to app.blackbox.ai/chat in future waves.
